attributes.action: Stop illegal wars by ratifying the Kampala Amendments
attributes.additional_details:
"In the UK, no citizen is above the law—yet a legal loophole remains for the most serious of all international crimes. Currently, a leader can plan an illegal war without facing the same domestic justice as those who commit war crimes on the battlefield.
By recognising the crime of aggression, we ensure that those in power are held to the same standards of accountability as any other citizen.
attributes.background:
Ratify the Kampala Amendments and outlaw the crime of aggression to align our domestic legal framework with our international commitments to justice and the rule of law
.

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action you are seeking in regards to the ICC, or how you would like the Government's approach to change. 

You can start a new petition setting this out more clearly.
